changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE user_profiles ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, email VARCHAR(255), first_name VARCHAR(255), last_name VARCHAR(255), phone VARCHAR(255), role VARCHAR(255), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), last_modified_by VARCHAR(255), tenant VARCHAR(255), state_entry_time TIMESTAMP, sla_yellow_date TIMESTAMP, sla_red_date TIMESTAMP, sla_tending_late INT DEFAULT 0, sla_late INT DEFAULT 0 )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE orders ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, order_number VARCHAR(255), customer_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, subtotal DECIMAL(12,2), tax_amount DECIMAL(12,2), shipping_amount DECIMAL(12,2), discount_amount DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0, total_amount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL, currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'INR', item_count INT DEFAULT 0, notes TEXT, cancel_reason VARCHAR(1000), description VARCHAR(2000), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, state_entry_time TIMESTAMP, sla_yellow_date TIMESTAMP, sla_red_date TIMESTAMP, sla_tending_late INT DEFAULT 0, sla_late INT DEFAULT 0 )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE payment ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, order_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, customer_id VARCHAR(255), amount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL, currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'INR', payment_method VARCHAR(20), gateway_transaction_id VARCHAR(255), failure_reason TEXT, state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), last_modified_by VARCHAR(255), tenant VARCHAR(255), state_entry_time TIMESTAMP, sla_yellow_date TIMESTAMP, sla_red_date TIMESTAMP, sla_tending_late INT DEFAULT 0, sla_late INT DEFAULT 0 )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE shipments ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, order_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, carrier VARCHAR(50), tracking_number VARCHAR(255), shipping_method VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'STANDARD', delivery_attempts INT DEFAULT 0, current_location VARCHAR(255), estimated_delivery_date TIMESTAMP, actual_delivery_date TIMESTAMP, state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, state_entry_time TIMESTAMP, sla_yellow_date TIMESTAMP, sla_red_date TIMESTAMP, sla_tending_late INT DEFAULT 0, sla_late INT DEFAULT 0 )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE products ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), brand VARCHAR(255), category_id VARCHAR(255), slug VARCHAR(300), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), last_modified_by VARCHAR(255), tenant VARCHAR(255) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE inventory_item ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, sku VARCHAR(255), product_id VARCHAR(255), variant_id VARCHAR(255), quantity INT DEFAULT 0, available_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, reserved_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, damaged_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, inbound_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, primary_fc VARCHAR(255), low_stock_threshold INT DEFAULT 10, status VARCHAR(50), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), supplier_id VARCHAR(255), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(255) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE supplier ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, business_name VARCHAR(255), name VARCHAR(255), email VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(50), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), last_modified_by VARCHAR(255), tenant VARCHAR(255) )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE returnrequest ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, order_id VARCHAR(255), customer_id VARCHAR(255), reason VARCHAR(1000), return_type VARCHAR(50), total_refund_amount DECIMAL(19,2), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), last_modified_by VARCHAR(255), tenant VARCHAR(255), state_entry_time TIMESTAMP, sla_yellow_date TIMESTAMP, sla_red_date TIMESTAMP, sla_tending_late INT DEFAULT 0, sla_late INT DEFAULT 0 )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE settlements ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, supplier_id VARCHAR(255), order_id VARCHAR(255), order_amount BIGINT, commission_amount BIGINT, commission_rate DECIMAL(5,2), platform_fee BIGINT, tds_amount DECIMAL(12,2), gst_on_commission DECIMAL(12,2), net_amount BIGINT, currency VARCHAR(3), settlement_period_start DATE, settlement_period_end DATE, state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), last_modified_by VARCHAR(255), tenant VARCHAR(255), state_entry_time TIMESTAMP, sla_yellow_date TIMESTAMP, sla_red_date TIMESTAMP )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE fulfillment_orders ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, order_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, warehouse_id VARCHAR(255), user_id VARCHAR(255), priority VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'STANDARD', fulfillment_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER', assigned_picker_id VARCHAR(255), assigned_packer_id VARCHAR(255), pick_started_at TIMESTAMP, pick_completed_at TIMESTAMP, pack_started_at TIMESTAMP, pack_completed_at TIMESTAMP, shipped_at TIMESTAMP, total_items INT DEFAULT 0, total_weight_grams INT, carrier VARCHAR(100), tracking_number VARCHAR(255), shipping_method VARCHAR(50), estimated_ship_date DATE, estimated_delivery_date DATE, notes VARCHAR(2000), state_id VARCHAR(100), flow_id VARCHAR(100), version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, created_by VARCHAR(255), last_modified_by VARCHAR(255), tenant VARCHAR(255), state_entry_time TIMESTAMP, sla_yellow_date TIMESTAMP, sla_red_date TIMESTAMP )

changeSet.author: homebase-test
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE warehouses ( id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, warehouse_code VARCHAR(20), warehouse_name VARCHAR(255), warehouse_type VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'FULFILLMENT_CENTER', city VARCHAR(100), state VARCHAR(100), max_capacity_units INT, current_utilization_pct DECIMAL(5,2), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, created_time TIMESTAMP, last_modified_time TIMESTAMP, tenant VARCHAR(255) )
